mapper.sql: a.id, a.applicant_user_id, a.applicant_name, a.application_type, a.target_name, a.reason, a.status, a.submit_time, a.process_time, a.approver_user_id, a.approver_name, a.review_remark, a.created_by, a.updated_by
mapper.select:
SELECT a.id, a.applicant_user_id, a.applicant_name, a.application_type, a.target_name, a.status, a.submit_time, a.process_time, a.approver_user_id, a.approver_name, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM biz_attachment ba WHERE ba.deleted = 0 AND ba.biz_type = 'application' AND ba.biz_id = a.id ) AS attachment_count FROM biz_application a WHERE
ORDER BY a.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM biz_application a WHERE

SELECT
FROM biz_application a WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.deleted = 0

SELECT id, step_no, approver_id, approver_name, action_type, CASE action_type WHEN 'submit' THEN '提交申请' WHEN 'approve' THEN '审核通过' WHEN 'reject' THEN '审核驳回' WHEN 'withdraw' THEN '撤回申请' ELSE '流程处理' END AS action_name, comment_text, before_status, after_status, acted_at FROM biz_application_record WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} ORDER BY step_no ASC, id ASC

SELECT
FROM biz_application a WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_application ( applicant_user_id, applicant_name, application_type, target_name, reason, status, approver_user_id, approver_name, review_remark, created_by, updated_by, deleted, version ) VALUES ( #{applicantUserId}, #{applicantName}, #{applicationType}, #{targetName}, #{reason}, #{status}, #{approverUserId}, #{approverName}, #{reviewRemark}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0, 0 )

INSERT INTO biz_application_record ( application_id, step_no, approver_id, approver_name, action_type, comment_text, before_status, after_status, acted_at ) VALUES ( #{applicationId}, #{stepNo}, #{approverId}, #{approverName}, #{actionType}, #{commentText}, #{beforeStatus}, #{afterStatus}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_application SET applicant_user_id = #{applicantUserId}, applicant_name = #{applicantName}, application_type = #{applicationType}, target_name = #{targetName}, reason = #{reason}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE biz_application SET deleted = 1, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE biz_application SET submit_time = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

UPDATE biz_application SET status = #{status}, process_time = NOW(), approver_user_id = #{approverUserId}, approver_name = #{approverName}, review_remark = #{reviewRemark}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

UPDATE biz_application SET status = #{status}, process_time = NOW(), approver_user_id = #{approverUserId}, approver_name = #{approverName}, review_remark = #{reviewRemark}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT a.id AS record_id, a.id AS application_id, a.applicant_name, a.application_type, a.target_name, a.status, a.submit_time, a.process_time, a.approver_name FROM biz_application a WHERE
AND a.status = 0 ORDER BY a.submit_time DESC, a.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM biz_application a WHERE
AND a.status = 0

SELECT a.id AS record_id, a.id AS application_id, a.applicant_name, a.application_type, a.target_name, a.status, a.submit_time, a.process_time, a.approver_name FROM biz_application a WHERE
AND a.status != 0 AND a.approver_user_id = #{currentUserId} ORDER BY a.process_time DESC, a.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM biz_application a WHERE
AND a.status != 0 AND a.approver_user_id = #{currentUserId}
